title: Villager Train Station
description: Adds a Villager Train Station and a ruined version to the world.
body:
**This mod adds a Villager Train Station and a rarer ruined version to the game, featuring different villagers working inside the station.**
![Train Station](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/63d21241effe63e18fce0e0dad7527e916562aaa.jpeg)

- Inside, you will find chests containing rails and items to help you build a railroad.
- The structure is beautifully decorated on the inside.
- The Villager Train Station can spawn in Plains and Forest biomes.

![Inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c1fa56b4761a34f9fa30ce4c61907268083d45a.jpeg)

Rarer ruined version:
![Ruined Version](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c17de395d414a261e5d5c4d0da4cdf8cd27eb7e.jpeg)


![Inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/23096cb5a2e1153deda8196b884c51b303ef6878.jpeg)


Villager working at the station:

![Inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6b30c23bb0d722048f376aad746462b5e7ebacea.jpeg)

Feel free to use this mod in your modpacks
